about.title: About me
paragraphs: Hi there! I'm a backend developer with 4 years of hands-on experience building and maintaining scalable web applications. I specialize in backend development, cloud infrastructure, and optimizing system performance.

I'm actively seeking opportunities to develop impactful software and web applications. I'm passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and delivering robust solutions, eager to contribute my expertise and continue growing as a developer.

expertise.title: Top Expertise
expertise.description: Backend developer with variety programming skills:

items: Architected a Node.js Customer Data Platform (CDP) processing 300k+ monthly records; optimized query performance via caching and asynchronous processing to deliver frontend-ready datasets.
Enhanced student platform stability for 670k+ users by refactoring APIs and implementing load balancing strategies, significantly reducing latency under high-concurrency traffic.
Led GCP infrastructure setup (K8s, CI/CD, Firewall) and migrated VMs to GKE/Cloud Run to enable Auto-scaling and Rolling Updates, cutting costs by 30% while maintaining zero-downtime deployment.
Established an automated monitoring and incident response system using GCP Error Reporting and Sentry, accelerating troubleshooting and reducing recovery time from hours to minutes.

jobs.company: Contract @ BCIT School of Computing and Academic Studies
items: Architected a CMS dashboard enabling faculty to monitor and manage ISSP projects in real-time, enhancing project visibility and tracking.
Collaborated in Agile teams to translate complex requirements into technical designs and actionable implementation plans.
Delivered a fully functional MVP on schedule, iteratively refining features based on client feedback to ensure high system usability and alignment with faculty needs.
Developed automated management features to replace manual workflows, significantly reducing administrative workload and improving overall efficiency.
Completed coursework in web development, data analysis, and system administration
Implemented unit testing to ensure code quality and adherence to professional standards
Gained hands-on experience collaborating with industry clients and professionals
Developed advanced writing, research, and presentation skills through experiments and reports
Enhanced and expanded knowledge of human science, social interaction and data analysis
Completed coursework in economics, international finance, and statistics
